sellers_note: Take a look at this! - BLIND SPOT MONITOR W/REAR CROSS TRAFFIC ALERT- intelligence clearance and back sonar and lane change assist- TOUCH-FREE POWER REAR DOOR- HEATED & VENTILATED FRONT SEATS- PREMIUM PACKAGE- POWER TILT & SLIDE MOONROOF- 3500 LBS TOW PREP PACKAGE- HEATED LEATHER STEERING WHEEL- ACCESSORY PACKAGEThis 2018 Lexus RX 350 is a well-equipped luxury SUV that offers a refined and comfortable driving experience. With its 3.5L V6 engine and 8-speed automatic transmission, it delivers a smooth and responsive performance, while the standard all-wheel drive system provides enhanced traction and control in various driving conditions.The exterior of this RX 350 is finished in a sleek and elegant White color, complementing the vehicle's sophisticated design. Inside, the cabin is thoughtfully appointed with premium materials and features, including the PREMIUM PACKAGE that adds desirable amenities like walnut trim, power-folding mirrors, and a memory system for the driver's seat and steering wheel.Convenience and safety are also top priorities, as evidenced by the TOUCH-FREE POWER REAR DOOR, BLIND SPOT MONITOR WITH REAR CROSS-TRAFFIC ALERT, and the 3500 LBS TOW PREP PACKAGE that enhances the vehicle's versatility. The HEATED & VENTILATED FRONT SEATS and HEATED LEATHER STEERING WHEEL provide added comfort and luxury, while the POWER TILT & SLIDE MOONROOF allows you to enjoy the great outdoors.This Lexus RX 350 is a well-appointed and capable luxury SUV that is sure to impress. Schedule a test drive today to experience its exceptional blend of performance, comfort, and technology.All pricing excludes applicable sales tax, DMV fees, and a $175 dealer documentation fee. Visit Lexus of Freeport at 70 W Sunrise Highway, Freeport, NY 11520 to experience this vehicle in person.
